items.label: View SiftMod report summary
items.description: Review clustered reports and an evidence packet for this item.

items.label: Seed SiftMod demo incident
items.description: Create a clearly labeled seed report incident for testing.

items.label: View SiftMod incident queue
items.description: Review recent SiftMod incidents for this subreddit.

items.label: Run SiftMod diagnostics
items.description: Check SiftMod settings and Redis connectivity for this subreddit.

abusiveReportMasking.label: Mask abusive report text
abusiveReportMasking.helpText: When enabled, SiftMod masks report reasons that match configured abusive keyword or regex patterns.

keywordList.label: Abusive report keyword/regex list
keywordList.helpText: One entry per line or comma. Optional prefixes: slur:, threat:, harassment:, doxxing:. Regex entries may use /pattern/flags.
keywordList.defaultValue:
threat:kill yourself
threat:kys
threat:i will kill
threat:death threat
harassment:harass
harassment:stalk
harassment:mass report
doxxing:dox
doxxing:doxx
doxxing:address
doxxing:phone number
doxxing:ip address
doxxing:swat

floodThresholdCount.label: Flood threshold count
floodThresholdCount.helpText: Number of reports in the time window before SiftMod marks an incident high severity.

floodWindowMinutes.label: Flood time window minutes
floodWindowMinutes.helpText: Time window used for clustering repeated reports and target-level report floods.

notifyHighSeverity.label: Send modmail notification for high severity
notifyHighSeverity.helpText: When enabled, SiftMod sends a modmail notification for high severity incidents.

demoSeedEnabled.label: Enable demo seed action
demoSeedEnabled.helpText: When enabled, moderators can seed clearly labeled test incidents from post/comment menus.
